name: revit_export_view_2d_geometry
description: Exports tessellated 2D geometry and text from a printable plan, section, or elevation view.

view_id.description: View to export (defaults to active view)

include_pattern_lines.description: Include pattern lines on geometric objects (default true)

display_style.description: DisplayStyle enum name (default view display style)

notes: Use ExportView static method; return ResultsSummary counts and optional serialized points.
